name: call_summary
description: Write a 1-3 sentence summary of the call based on the call transcript. Should capture the important information and actions taken during the call.

name: call_successful
description: Evaluate whether the agent had a successful call with the user. For a successful call, the agent should have a complete conversation with user, finished the task, and have not ran into technical issues, or caused user frustration. Besides, the agent was not blocked by a call screen or encountered voicemail.

name: user_sentiment
description: Evaluate user's sentiment, mood and satisfaction level.

name: is_lead
description: True if the caller is a potential customer requesting service, a quote, an estimate, or scheduling work (repair, installation, maintenance, tune-up, inspection). False if the caller is a wrong number, existing customer asking an admin question, spam, robocall, or employee-related call.

name: urgency
description: Severity tier of the caller's need. 'emergency' = no heat in winter, no AC in heat wave, gas smell, water leak, CO alarm — needs same-day response. 'high' = system partially working, customer discomfort, can wait 24 hours. 'normal' = routine repair or estimate, flexible scheduling. 'low' = information request, future planning, tune-up. 'none' = not a service call.

name: is_spam
description: True if the call is a robocall, telemarketer, silent/dropped, obvious scam, or wrong number with no service intent. False for any legitimate caller regardless of whether they book.
